reasoning: The control 'Segregation of Duties' is directly related to ensuring that no single user or role has excessive permissions that could lead to security risks. In Kubernetes, this is primarily managed through RBAC (Role-Based Access Control). By defining roles and role bindings carefully, we can enforce segregation of duties. The functions focus on ensuring that roles are appropriately separated and no single user has full control over the cluster, which aligns with the principle of segregation of duties.
title: Segregation of Duties
